Built on Integrity, Driven by Results

Wonderwoman Construction started with a simple goal: to deliver exceptional remodeling services with unmatched integrity. We saw a need for contractors who not only possessed the skills to transform spaces but also the commitment to treat every project as if it were their own home.

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our remodeling contractor services.

How long does a typical kitchen remodel take?

The duration of a kitchen remodel varies depending on the scope of the project, but typically ranges from 6 to 12 weeks. We'll provide a detailed timeline during the initial consultation.

Do you handle all the necessary permits?

Yes, we handle all necessary permits and inspections to ensure your project complies with local regulations. We're familiar with Minneapolis' specific building codes.

Can you work with my existing kitchen layout?

Absolutely! We can work with your existing layout or create a completely new design, depending on your needs and preferences.

Reviews From Our Remodeling Contractor Customers

See what our satisfied customers have to say about their experience.

"Wonderwoman Construction completely transformed our outdated kitchen into a modern, functional space. They listened to our needs and preferences and delivered a kitchen that exceeded our expectations. The team was professional, efficient, and kept us informed throughout the entire process. Highly recommend!"

Sarah M. Kitchen Remodeling

"We hired Wonderwoman Construction to finish our unfinished basement, and we're thrilled with the results. They created a comfortable and inviting family room that we now use all the time. The only minor issue was a slight delay in the project timeline, but they communicated proactively and made sure everything was completed to our satisfaction."

David L. Basement Finishing

"After a severe storm, our roof was damaged, and we needed a quick and reliable roofing contractor. Wonderwoman Construction responded promptly and provided a thorough inspection and estimate. They replaced our roof efficiently and professionally, and we haven't had any issues since. Great service!"

Emily K. Roofing Services
